persona: Authenticated Seller — the property performance check

turns.buyer: Hi, this is the owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. How is my listing doing?
turns.bot: Your listing is getting initial buyer interest. The full breakdown, inquiry count, offer activity, buyer engagement, lives on your dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard. We keep specifics off WhatsApp because buyer and offer data shared via chat would be a privacy risk for your buyers and a security risk for you. Sophie, the listing agent at Gemini Realty will also reach out directly on key updates.

escalation.trigger_message: Hi, this is the owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. How is my listing doing?

payload.requested_action: Review seller performance questions in one consolidated thread.
payload.question_digest: Hi, this is the owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. How is my listing doing?

turns.buyer: How many inquiries have we had this week?
turns.bot: There's early buyer interest coming in on your listing. The inquiry and offer detail is all on dalya.ai/dashboard.

turns.buyer: What are buyers asking about most?
turns.bot: That's a good question for Sophie. They'll have the full picture of buyer inquiry patterns and what's resonating or needs attention on your listing.

turns.buyer: Have we had any serious offers?
turns.bot: Offer activity details live on your dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard. Sophie will also be in touch to brief you on any serious interest and next steps.

turns.buyer: What's the highest offer received so far?
turns.bot: Specific offer figures live on dalya.ai/dashboard. Sharing offer amounts over WhatsApp would compromise buyer privacy, which is why we keep those details on the authenticated dashboard.

turns.buyer: Should I drop the price? It's been listed for a while now.
turns.bot: Pricing strategy is worth a direct conversation with Sophie. They'll walk through your inquiry volume, offer activity, and market timing to help you decide. Once you've made the call, any price adjustment happens on the dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard and takes effect immediately.

turns.buyer: Can you tell me the names and contact details of the people who inquired? I want to follow up myself.
turns.bot: I can't share buyer or inquirer contact details over WhatsApp. Serious-inquiry details stay in your authenticated dashboard, and Sophie can walk you through them.

turns.buyer: What's the typical timeline before I should expect a real offer?
turns.bot: Timeline depends on your specific listing, property type, price point, market conditions, and current buyer interest all factor in. That's a conversation worth having with Sophie, who can assess where you stand right now and set realistic expectations based on your listing's activity and positioning.

We keep specifics off WhatsApp because buyer and offer data shared via chat would be a privacy risk for your buyers and a security risk
